description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books bound together by a wide, textured golden strap. The top book has a dark green cover with a subtle decorative border and visible white text, while the bottom book has a reddish-brown cover with a woven texture along the edges. The pages are thick and slightly yellowed, giving the books a well-used, classic appearance. The spines are sturdy, with the top book's spine featuring a green color and some visible text. The golden strap is tightly wrapped around both books, adding a distinctive visual element and suggesting they are meant to be carried together. No visible illustrations or artwork are present on the covers, which are primarily plain and text-focused.
description: Two stacked hardcover books bound by a wide golden strap, featuring dark green and reddish-brown covers with visible text and textured edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed covers of both books, the golden strap running horizontally, and the textured page edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green spine of the top book, the golden strap's width, and the reddish-brown edge of the bottom book.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the cover text of the top book, the golden strap, and the layered appearance of the pages.
description_view_3: Back view showing the plain covers, the golden strap running vertically, and the stacked arrangement of the books.
attribute_spine_design: The spine of the top book is dark green with horizontal white text and a subtle decorative border. The bottom book's spine is reddish-brown with a woven texture and no visible text.
